hooks.command: sh -c 'if ! command -v story >/dev/null 2>&1; then printf "%s\n" "{\"systemMessage\":\"Powered by Story: Tracking is enabled, but the Story CLI is not installed or not on PATH. Installation guide: https://docs.story.io/cli/installation#installation-methods\"}"; exit 0; fi; exec story hooks codex session-start'
sh -c 'if ! command -v story >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec story hooks codex user-prompt-submit'
sh -c 'if ! command -v story >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec story hooks codex stop'
